steps.title: Provide your ad reference

items.question: What is Ads Remake?
items.answer: Ads Remake is an AI workflow that helps you recreate and remaster popular advertising formats and styles. It transforms proven ad concepts into custom content for your brand using Sora 2 video generation.

items.question: Can I remake any ad style?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow can adapt various ad styles—product demos, lifestyle ads, UGC formats, testimonial styles, and trending social media ad formats to feature your brand.

items.question: What AI model powers this workflow?
items.answer: This workflow uses Sora 2, OpenAI's advanced video generation model, to create high-quality video ads with professional motion, transitions, and visual effects.

items.question: Is this for creating original ads or copies?
items.answer: The workflow helps you create original ads inspired by successful formats. It adapts proven creative frameworks to your unique brand, products, and messaging—not direct copies.

items.question: What video formats are supported?
items.answer: Generate ads optimized for various platforms: vertical for TikTok/Reels, square for Instagram, horizontal for YouTube, and custom aspect ratios for specific needs.

items.question: How do credits work for video generation?
items.answer: Video generation with Sora 2 consumes credits based on duration and complexity. The workflow is optimized to produce high-impact advertising content efficiently.
